today.mood: Cloudy but warm — perfect for indoor shopping or evening mamak sessions
today.best_time_to_go_out: Evening after 6PM when it cools down
today.summary: Overcast skies keeping temps comfortable at 28°C. Low humidity makes it pleasant for late afternoon mall trips or evening outdoor dining. Night owls will enjoy the cool breeze.

weather.advisory: Low humidity, comfortable conditions. Good for outdoor activities in evening.

finance.plain_english: Ringgit steady at RM3.96 to USD. Gold up slightly but won't affect your nasi lemak budget. RON95 unchanged at RM2.05 — still affordable for weekend drives. Bitcoin up but irrelevant for daily kopitiam sessions.

news.plain_english: Petrol still RM2.05/L. No change this week. Weekend road trips remain affordable.
